last_smoke_test.summary: Claude Code 2.1.198 added a disposable user marketplace, installed and uninstalled mlx-agent, and listed all three skills. Claude details did not expose slash-command discovery; the generated launcher returned fixture-backed Scout evidence.

release_evidence.native_discovery: skills listed; slash-command session not run

schema.summary: Generated Claude package contract is covered by adapter tests.

install_round_trip.summary: Claude Code 2.1.198 marketplace add, user-scope install, and uninstall passed in a disposable HOME.

native_discovery.summary: Claude plugin details listed mlx-adopt, mlx-scout, and mlx-wire skills, but no slash-command discovery surface was exercised without a model session.

bundle_execution.summary: The generated Claude launcher returned fixture-backed Scout output; this is not a model-backed Claude invocation.

model_backed_invocation.summary: No model-backed Claude invocation was tested.

last_smoke_test.summary: Codex CLI 0.137.0 isolated marketplace registration, install, and namespaced-skill prompt injection passed. The authorized fixture-only Scout session was DNS-blocked before a model response.

schema.summary: Native plugin manifest and skills contract are covered by tests.

install_round_trip.summary: Codex CLI 0.137.0 marketplace registration and plugin install passed in an isolated home; cleanup is guaranteed after a DNS-blocked fixture-only session.

native_discovery.summary: Codex prompt input exposed all three installed namespaced skills.

bundle_execution.summary: The generated Codex Scout launcher returned fixture-backed output; the smoke's installed-bundle launcher step was not reached after the DNS-blocked session.

model_backed_invocation.summary: Authenticated Codex model response was blocked by DNS policy and is not claimed.

last_smoke_test.summary: Gemini CLI 0.46.0 validation/install, user and project skill discovery, fixture-backed Scout, and cleanup passed in a disposable HOME; command-list routing and model invocation were not run.

release_evidence.native_discovery: skills listed in both scopes; slash-command discovery not run

schema.summary: Extension, command TOML, and structured transport contracts are covered by tests.

install_round_trip.summary: Isolated user extension install/remove and project installer round trip passed.

native_discovery.summary: User and project bundled skills were discovered; the model-routable /commands list probe remained disabled.

bundle_execution.summary: Installed launcher executed fixture-backed Scout; no native slash command was invoked.

model_backed_invocation.summary: No Gemini model-backed slash-command response is claimed.

last_smoke_test.summary: OpenCode 1.18.3 discovered all three commands from an isolated XDG configuration and completed the receipt-owned package lifecycle. The model-backed invocation reached the configured provider but network access was unavailable.

release_evidence.native_discovery: all three commands visible in the native command palette

schema.summary: Generated TypeScript plugin and command contracts are statically validated.

install_round_trip.summary: Receipt-owned install/update/uninstall lifecycle is tested without an OpenCode CLI.

native_discovery.summary: OpenCode 1.18.3 displayed /mlx-scout, /mlx-adopt, and /mlx-wire from the isolated XDG configuration.

bundle_execution.summary: Equivalent no-shell argv/stdin transport reached the bundled executor.

model_backed_invocation.summary: The native invocation reached the configured provider, but the provider response was blocked by unavailable network access.

last_smoke_test.summary: Disposable AgentSkills user/project installation, installed fixture-backed Scout, and clean receipt-owned uninstall passed with scoped transaction locks.

schema.summary: Portable skill package contract is covered by generated-adapter tests.

install_round_trip.summary: Fixture user/project install and uninstall completed with locks held under scoped installer receipt storage, not artifact directories.

native_discovery.summary: AgentSkills is a portable format, not one native host.

bundle_execution.summary: The installed portable mlx-scout launcher returned fixture-backed Scout output.

model_backed_invocation.summary: No host model invocation is claimed.
